data.description:
## Incident Overview

plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-format-fix.sh:35 references `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/config-paths.sh` while `set -u` is active. When invoked outside a Claude Code session that pre-exports CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (i.e. test isolation), the unbound variable triggers exit 1 before any logic runs.

## Reproduction
- cd to a fresh git repo with a Python file
- bash plugins/dso/scripts/pre-commit-format-fix.sh
- Observed: "line 35: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: unbound variable"; exit 1
- Expected: format/lint pass, exit 0

## Test failure
tests/hooks/test-format-fix.sh: 5/11 cases fail (test_clean_file_exits_zero, test_unformatted_file_exits_zero, test_unformatted_file_was_fixed, test_staging_preserved_exits_zero, test_non_python_exits_zero) — all expect EXIT 0.

## Scope
- Script is NOT wired into .pre-commit-config.yaml — not enforcement-boundary
- Fix: derive _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE per CLAUDE.md "Plugin path pattern"
data.title: [pre-commit-format-fix.sh]: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound under set -u -> test-format-fix.sh fails 5/11
